title: 7 Top-Quality Stocks to Buy Before Q4
text: Quality stocks to buy can be hard to find as economic uncertainty prevails. The Federal Reserve is raising interest rates again, this time by another three-quarters of a percentage point.

title: Fast-paced Momentum Stock Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) Is Still Trading at a Bargain
text: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) could be a great choice for investors looking to buy stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices. It is one of the several stocks that made it through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen.

title: 5 High Earnings Yield Value Picks to Counter a Dicey September
text: In what is historically viewed as the worst month for the stock markets, stay safe by investing in high earnings yield value companies like ALB, WCC, STNG, EWBC and TRGP.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in Investor Conferences
